content.text: 4 MP4 files found. Running the conversions now — 12 WebM files (3 qualities each) + 4 WebP thumbnails.

input.command:
for f in longevity-01.mp4 longevity-02.mp4 longevity-03.mp4 longevity-04.mp4; do
  base="${f%.mp4}"
  # 90% quality → CRF 10
  ffmpeg -i "$f" -vf "scale=270:480:force_original_aspect_ratio=disable" -c:v libvpx-vp9 -b:v 0 -crf 10 -an -y "${base}-90.webm" 2>&1 | tail -1
  echo "Done: ${base}-90.webm"
  # 80% quality → CRF 20
  ffmpeg -i "$f" -vf "scale=270:480:force_original_aspect_ratio=disable" -c:v libvpx-vp9 -b:v 0 -crf 20 -an -y "${base}-80.webm" 2>&1 | tail -1
  echo "Done: ${base}-80.webm"
  # 70% quality → CRF 30
  ffmpeg -i "$f" -vf "scale=270:480:force_original_aspect_ratio=disable" -c:v libvpx-vp9 -b:v 0 -crf 30 -an -y "${base}-70.webm" 2>&1 | tail -1
  echo "Done: ${base}-70.webm"
  # First frame as WebP
  ffmpeg -i "$f" -vf "scale=270:480:force_original_aspect_ratio=disable" -vframes 1 -q:v 90 -y "${base}-thumb.webp" 2>&1 | tail -1
  echo "Done: ${base}-thumb.webp"
done
input.description: Convert 4 videos to WebM at 3 quality levels and extract first frame as WebP

input.command:
for f in longevity-01.mp4 longevity-02.mp4 longevity-03.mp4 longevity-04.mp4; do
  base="${f%.mp4}"
  ffmpeg -i "$f" -vf "scale=270:480:force_original_aspect_ratio=disable" -vframes 1 -y "/tmp/${base}-thumb.png" 2>/dev/null
  cwebp -q 90 "/tmp/${base}-thumb.png" -o "${base}-thumb.webp"
  echo "Done: ${base}-thumb.webp"
done

content.text: My fault — I used `-an` which strips audio. Re-running without it:

input.command:
for f in longevity-01.mp4 longevity-02.mp4 longevity-03.mp4 longevity-04.mp4; do
  base="${f%.mp4}"
  ffmpeg -i "$f" -vf "scale=270:480:force_original_aspect_ratio=disable" -c:v libvpx-vp9 -b:v 0 -crf 10 -c:a libopus -y "${base}-90.webm" 2>&1 | tail -1 && echo "Done: ${base}-90.webm"
  ffmpeg -i "$f" -vf "scale=270:480:force_original_aspect_ratio=disable" -c:v libvpx-vp9 -b:v 0 -crf 20 -c:a libopus -y "${base}-80.webm" 2>&1 | tail -1 && echo "Done: ${base}-80.webm"
  ffmpeg -i "$f" -vf "scale=270:480:force_original_aspect_ratio=disable" -c:v libvpx-vp9 -b:v 0 -crf 30 -c:a libopus -y "${base}-70.webm" 2>&1 | tail -1 && echo "Done: ${base}-70.webm"
done
